body.notes: Participation in IETF meetings constitutes agreement to the Note Well, which permits recording, transcription, and public archival of proceedings. See also BCP 78 (RFC 5378) and BCP 79 (RFC 8179) for IPR policies.

body.title: Requirements and Considerations in BGP Peer Auto-Configuration
BGP NLRI App Meta Data for 5G Edge Computing Service
BGP UPDATE for SDWAN Edge Discovery
BGP SR Policy Extensions to Enable IFIT (draft-ietf-idr-sr-policy-ifit-01)
BGP Extension for SR-MPLS Entropy Label Position
BGP Extension for Advertising IFIT Capabilities
BGP-LS Extensions for Segment Routing based Enhanced VPN
Analysis of VPN Routes Control in Shared BGP Session
